payload.answer: Detected an open loop: the article could not be fetched, so its contents remain unavailable.

open_loops.description: The user asked to remember an article, but the fetch failed with a 404/network error, so the article contents could not be accessed or verified.
open_loops.evidence: Remember this article: https://example.com/missing why: useful for memory architecture. Mock fetch result: 404 network error.
